name_cn:
Genuine Grade, High Version
Large with strap
2022 latest lunch box bag🆕, highly recommended, a big hit at the flagship store🔥, pillow-like quilted, classic old flower embroidery, iconic letters😝, very light for personal use, good capacity, can hold cute things and also fits a mobile phone👝
size:22*13*9.5cm
Model: 8017
